description_long: This object is a rectangular, neon yellow-green juice carton with a distressed, industrial aesthetic. The front face features a bold graphic of a gas mask surrounded by a glowing effect, with the words 'ATOM JUICE' stenciled beneath it. The back face displays a large biohazard symbol above the text 'NON-FLAMMABLE NON-TOXIC GAS', both rendered in a similar glowing style. Diagonal black hazard stripes run along the narrow sides, adding to the hazardous, cautionary theme. The top of the carton has a small, square spout or cap, also marked with hazard stripes. The surface appears to be made of a matte, slightly rough material, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look.
description: A neon yellow-green juice carton with industrial hazard graphics, including a gas mask and biohazard symbol, and black caution stripes on the sides.
description_view_0: The narrow side of the carton, showing diagonal black hazard stripes on a neon yellow-green background.
description_view_1: The front face, featuring a gas mask graphic and the text 'ATOM JUICE' with a glowing effect.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side, also displaying diagonal black hazard stripes similar to view 0.
description_view_3: The back face, showing a large biohazard symbol and the text 'NON-FLAMMABLE NON-TOXIC GAS' in a glowing style.
